core_mechanism: stagewise additive ensemble construction via functional gradient descent (gradient boosting): a strong predictor is built by iteratively adding weak learners, each fit to the negative gradient of the loss of the current ensemble, minimizing a supervised prediction-error functional
brief_reason: The abstract's method centers on Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) as the most reliable classifier trained by cross-validation, which is exactly the iterative addition of weak learners along the loss gradient (with a Shapley-value / cooperative-game attribution layer used only afterward for feature-contribution interpretability).
